title: Relative clause with que
subtitle: Join two ideas with that/which/who.
overview: Que connects a noun to more information.
It helps avoid choppy beginner sentences.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Tengo un amigo que vive en Madrid.
I have a friend who lives in Madrid.
Compré un libro que parece útil.
I bought a book that seems useful.
Hay una tienda que abre tarde.
There is a store that opens late.

items.es: Conozco a una persona que habla cinco idiomas.
items.en: I know a person who speaks five languages.

items.es: Necesito una mochila que no sea muy cara.
items.en: I need a backpack that is not very expensive.

items.es: Busco un restaurante que tenga comida vegetariana.
items.en: I am looking for a restaurant that has vegetarian food.

items.es: Vivo en un barrio que es tranquilo.
items.en: I live in a neighborhood that is quiet.

items.es: Vi una película que me gustó mucho.
items.en: I saw a movie that I liked a lot.
